name: Bitwatch
compose:
name: slashnode-bitwatch
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/zapomatic/bitwatch:v1.7.2
    container_name: bitwatch
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/server/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3117:3117
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-bitwatch_web_data
